# disableStorageBehaviorOptimization

**Instance Property**

If disableStorageBehaviorOptimization is set to YES, then all the waiting mechanism as described above is disabled.

## Declaration

```swift
var disableStorageBehaviorOptimization: Bool { get set }
```
